heading: Deputy Comptroller for the supervision and examination of Federal savings associations
label: 4b Deputy Comptroller for the supervision and examination of Federal savings associations
text: The Comptroller of the Currency shall designate a Deputy Comptroller, who shall be responsible for the supervision and examination of Federal savings associations.
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the transfer date, see , set out as an Effective Date of 2010 Amendment note under .section 314(d) of Pub. L. 111–203section 1 of this title
